mapper.select: SELECT TRIM(c.COMPONENT_ID) AS componentId, TRIM(c.COMPONENT_NAME) AS componentName, c.COMPONENT_DESC AS componentDesc, c.COMPONENT_TYPE AS componentType, TRIM(c.COMPONENT_CLASS_NAME) AS componentClassName, TRIM(c.COMPONENT_METHOD_NAME) AS componentMethodName, c.COMPONENT_CREATE_TYPE AS componentCreateType, c.BIZ_GROUP_ID AS bizGroupId, c.USE_YN AS useYn, c.LAST_UPDATE_DTIME AS lastUpdateDtime, TRIM(c.LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID) AS lastUpdateUserId FROM FWK_COMPONENT c WHERE c.COMPONENT_ID = #{componentId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FWK_COMPONENT ( COMPONENT_ID, COMPONENT_NAME, COMPONENT_DESC, COMPONENT_TYPE, COMPONENT_CLASS_NAME, COMPONENT_METHOD_NAME, COMPONENT_CREATE_TYPE, BIZ_GROUP_ID, USE_YN, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID ) VALUES ( #{dto.componentId}, #{dto.componentName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.componentDesc, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.componentType}, #{dto.componentClassName}, #{dto.componentMethodName}, #{dto.componentCreateType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.bizGroupId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.useYn}, #{lastUpdateDtime}, #{lastUpdateUserId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE FWK_COMPONENT SET COMPONENT_NAME = #{dto.componentName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, COMPONENT_DESC = #{dto.componentDesc, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, COMPONENT_TYPE = #{dto.componentType}, COMPONENT_CLASS_NAME = #{dto.componentClassName}, COMPONENT_METHOD_NAME = #{dto.componentMethodName}, COMPONENT_CREATE_TYPE = #{dto.componentCreateType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BIZ_GROUP_ID = #{dto.bizGroupId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, USE_YN = #{dto.useYn}, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME = #{lastUpdateDtime}, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID = #{lastUpdateUserId} WHERE COMPONENT_ID = #{componentId}
mapper.sql: c.COMPONENT_ID, c.COMPONENT_NAME, c.COMPONENT_DESC, c.COMPONENT_TYPE, c.COMPONENT_CLASS_NAME, c.COMPONENT_METHOD_NAME, c.COMPONENT_CREATE_TYPE, c.BIZ_GROUP_ID, c.USE_YN, c.LAST_UPDATE_DTIME, c.LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID
mapper.select: SELECT COMPONENT_ID AS componentId, PARAM_SEQ_NO AS paramSeqNo, TRIM(PARAM_KEY) AS paramKey, PARAM_DESC AS paramDesc, DEFAULT_PARAM_VALUE AS defaultParamValue FROM FWK_COMPONENT_PARAM WHERE COMPONENT_ID = #{componentId} ORDER BY PARAM_SEQ_NO
